# Bismuth

> Convert ATProto richtext-block documents from Standard.site publications to Markdown.

Bismuth is a free, open-source, browser-based tool that converts ATProto richtext-block documents from Standard.site publications — Leaflet, Pckt, and Offprint — into clean Markdown. No data leaves the browser. No sign-in required.

## Supported formats

- Leaflet: pub.leaflet.content and site.standard.document records with full block support (headings, paragraphs, lists, images, embeds).
- Pckt: blog.pckt.content with inline and blob-mode content resolution.
- Offprint: app.offprint.content including task lists, web embeds, and coloured highlights.

## What's converted

Headings (h1–h6), paragraphs and line breaks, bold/italic/strikethrough, ordered and unordered lists, links and images, fenced code blocks, block quotes, task lists (Offprint). Embeds are represented as links. Complex layouts are flattened.

## Pages

- /: Landing page and feature overview
- /convert: Document converter (paste JSON or upload a .json file)
- /about: Privacy details, supported formats, CLI usage, licence, and credits

## Privacy

Runs entirely in the browser. Documents are parsed locally and never uploaded to any server. No cookies, no local storage, no fingerprinting.

## CLI

Also available as a Node.js CLI tool. Clone https://github.com/ewanc26/pkgs, install dependencies in packages/bismuth, then run `pnpm start input.json`.

## Licence

AGPL-3.0-only
